name: Orange Pecan Gems
recipeIngredient: DUNCAN HINES Moist Deluxe Cake Mix -Orange Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease baking sheets.
2. Combine cake mix, yogurt, egg, butter, and chopped pecans in a large bowl. Beat at low speed with an electric mixer until blended.
3. Drop the mixture by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets. Press pecan halves onto the center of each cookie.
4. Bake at 350°F for 11-13 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 1 minute on the baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks and cool completely.
5. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 4 1/2 to 5 dozen cookies.
TIP: Cookies may be stored in an airtight container in the freezer for up to 6 months.
